blocks.text: Graham Hansen and Barcelona delivered a Champions League quarter-final masterclass, while Manchester United — with Naalsund and Terland — suffered a European setback. Two Norwegian stories from the same night.
🏎️ Fri–Sun — Aramco Japanese GP: Russell leads Antonelli by just 4pts — Suzuka decides early momentum
